chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.S-19 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.143 / 2016. 2. For orders on MA No.144 / 2016. 3. For hearing. 06-01-2016. Mr. Shahab Sarki advocate for applicant along with applicant. 1&2. Granted. 3. Through this criminal bail application, the applicant seeks protective bail in crime No.27 / 2015, under section 409, 109, 34 PPC read with section 5 PCA 1947 of PS FIA Crime Circle, Karachi. It is, inter-alia, contended by the learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant is respectable lady and innocent has been implicated falsely in the instant case by the FIA malafidely with ulterior motives. He further contended that the alleged incident in the FIR is shown to have taken place in August, 2010 but the FIR is lodged on 31.12.2015, after delay of five years without any plausible explanation. Learned counsel further contended that the applicant is ready to surrender before the trial Court but she apprehends her arrest with ulterior motives at the hands of FIA officials on account of humiliation, therefore, she is unable to approach the learned trial Court and get appropriate remedy. Learned counsel prayed for protection enabling the applicant to approach the trial Court for appropriate remedy. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for ten days commencing from today, subject to her furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees one hundred thousand) to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. Learned counsel for the applicant pleads that office of Nazir is closed, as such, surety be considered to be deposited by tomorrow i.e. 07-01-2016.

Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for ten days commencing from today, subject to her furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees one hundred thousand) to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. Learned counsel for the applicant pleads that office of Nazir is closed, as such, surety be considered to be deposited by tomorrow i.e. 07-01-2016. Order accordingly. This order shall seize to have its effect on expiry of aforementioned period i.e. upto 15-01-2015 after Court / office hours or when the applicant would surrender before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. Criminal bail application stands disposed of. J U D G E *Abdullah Channa/PS*
